_readme: Upcoming events shown on the home page (list + calendar) and the
Calendar page. Edited from the /admin page (or by hand) until Ludus
Each event needs: title and date (YYYY-MM-DD, used for sorting, for
the calendar grid, and for dropping past events automatically).
Optional: url (the Ludus event page - without it the event shows
with no Tickets link), time (e.g. '7:00 PM'), presenter (who's
putting it on), and dateLabel (display text that overrides the
formatted date, for runs like 'July 18-20'). Enter a multi-day run
as one entry per day with the same title and dateLabel: every day
gets marked on the calendar, and the list collapses them into one.
Keys starting with _ are ignored by the site.
If this list is empty or unreachable, the pages simply fall back to
the 'browse events on our ticketing site' link - nothing breaks.
The entries below were copied on 2026-07-02 from the old site's
public Google Calendar (Bonita Center Calendar of Events,

events.title: Western University White Coat Ceremony (invited guests only)
